reviews.comment: Hey yesterday we have visited the coffee island in Amanora mall it was our first time in Pune at such a great cafe plus point we have ordered mocha espresso and cappuccino with tea cake. Tanmay servers us with kind and sweet nature he added extra feel in cafe Tanmay you are great man keep it up and even he have greet us with warm welcome 🤗 see ya soon man we'll visit soon and with family and friends.

reviewReply.comment: Glad to know your first visit in Pune was such a memorable one! Happy to hear you enjoyed the mocha espresso, cappuccino, and tea cake, along with the warm and welcoming atmosphere. We truly appreciate the love and look forward to welcoming you back soon with family and friends. ☕

reviews.comment: I visited coffee island yesterday and the entire experience right from the moment I entered the place was awesome. Tanmay was very sweet and he greeted us with very welcoming and friendly vibe. He made delicious coffee and was very attentive and polite. It was the first time I visited this coffee shop in Amanora mall and loved it. I will for sure be visiting here again. I highly recommend this place.

reviewReply.comment: Glad to know your first visit at Amanora Mall was such a wonderful one! It’s great to hear the welcoming vibe, attentive service, and delicious coffee made your experience memorable. We truly appreciate the recommendation and look forward to welcoming you back again soon. ☕✨
